zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Newsom於1252年之前出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Thomas de Newsome28歲，母親Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock27歲。她和William le Scrope Lord of Bolton至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1298年在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Newsom于1252年之前出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Thomas de Newsome28岁，母亲Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock27岁。她和William le Scrope Lord of Bolton至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1298年在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Newsom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Newsome
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from one or more of the many north-country places of this name in Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire. The placenames derive from Old English nīwe ‘new’ + hūs ‘house’ (dative plural hūsum); (æt thǣm) nīwehūsum ‘(at the) new houses’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Newsom was born before 1252, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Newsome, was 28 and her mother, Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with William le Scrope Lord of Bolton. She died about 1298, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Newsom est née avant 1252, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Newsome, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec William le Scrope Lord of Bolton. Elle est décédée environ 1298, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Newsom vor 1252 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Newsome 28 und ihre Mutter Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock 27. Sie hatte mit William le Scrope Lord of Bolton mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1298 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con William le Scrope Lord of Bolton. Morì circa 1298, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Newsomが1252年以前にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Newsomeは28歳，母Lucy FitzPiers Brecknockは27歳であった。彼女はWilliam le Scrope Lord of Boltonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1298年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Newsom(이)가 1252년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Newsome(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 William le Scrope Lord of Bolton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Newsom родилась перед 1252 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Newsome было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy FitzPiers Brecknock, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от William le Scrope Lord of Bolton. Она умерла около 1298 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
